name: Kadaifi
recipeInstructions:
Note: Use blanched almonds.
1. Allow the raw kadaifi dough to air dry for 10 to 15 minutes.
2. Spread half of the pastry evenly over the bottom of a 9 x 12 x 3-inch baking pan and brush with half the butter.
3. In a small bowl, combine finely chopped almonds, 1/4 cup sugar, 1 tablespoon cinnamon, and orange juice (if using). Mix until it forms a paste that can be spread with a knife.
4. Spread the almond mixture over the kadaifi pastry.
5. Cover with the remaining dough and brush with the remaining butter.
6. Bake in a moderate oven (350°F) for 40 minutes or slightly longer, until golden on top.
7. While baking, boil the remaining sugar, water, honey, and lemon juice for 5 minutes. Stir to combine and keep boiling.
8. Remove the pastry from the oven and place it on a rack to cool in the pan.
9. Pour the hot syrup over the cooled pastry.
10. Cover with a dry towel and allow to cool thoroughly.
11. Cut into square or diamond shapes of any desired size.
12. Dust with additional ground cinnamon just before serving on dessert plates.
